pageHero.leadParagraph: We're growing across Canada. Choose a location for directions and service details.

onlineMessage.title: Can't make it in person?
onlineMessage.leadParagraph: Wherever you are, you can still gather with us. Stream the Sunday service live or watch on demand.

pageHero.leadParagraph: Lighthouse Gospel Ministry exists to see a spirit-filled generation rise — people who carry the light of the gospel into every sphere of life.

body.title: Everyone has a place and a purpose here.
body.leadParagraph: We're a warm, growing family who believe the light of the gospel is meant to be carried into homes, workplaces, campuses and communities. Wherever you are on your journey, you belong at the table.

steps.heading: The Word of God
steps.paragraph: Scripture is our foundation — living, practical and trustworthy for every season of life.

steps.heading: The Spirit at work
steps.paragraph: We make room for the Holy Spirit to lead, comfort, empower and transform ordinary people.

steps.heading: A people sent
steps.paragraph: We're raised up to carry light outward — into our cities, our nation and the world.

pageHero.leadParagraph: Worship nights, first-timer lunches and gatherings for every season of life. There's always a next step at Lighthouse.

items.title: Community Worship Night
items.description: A night where we come together to pray, worship and fellowship with one another.
